title: Woman, 71, arrested after Prestwick Airport anti-war protest

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Woman, 71, arrested after Prestwick Airport anti-war protest. The Stop the War Coalition joined the Ayrshire Campaign for Nuclear Disarmament and Ayrshire Global Justice to swarm the airport on Sunday.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Woman, 71, arrested after Prestwick Airport anti-war protest
